channel.title: Active Projects & Research on Toki Tahmid | Digital Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Active Projects & Research on Toki Tahmid | Digital Portfolio

item.title: The H.O.L.M.E.S. Initiative
item.description:
Here we detail the constitutional framework and primary objectives of the four-founder H.O.L.M.E.S. research group.

Our current focus lies in bridging the gap between theoretical mechanical engineering and practical, aerospace-applicable innovation.

item.title: Hult Prize Competition 2026
item.description: I am currently competing in the Hult Prize. We are leveraging my mechanical engineering background and their software expertise to build a business model that addresses critical sustainability goals.

item.title: SAPCMTY: Revenue & Performance Architecture
item.description: Designing the foundational revenue generation models and performance tracking structures.

item.title: Wireless Electricity Transmission by Microwave (MPT)
item.description: An award-winning engineering prototype demonstrating the wireless transmission of high-voltage electricity via microwave frequencies, eliminating the need for traditional power grids.

item.title: NASA Citizen Scientist: Asteroid Discovery
item.description: In 2019, I participated in a citizen science initiative with the NASA Jet Propulsion Laboratory (JPL). Through meticulous data analysis, I successfully identified three provisional asteroids. This achievement remains a cornerstone of my commitment to aerospace exploration.
